en.extract:
The black spinetail (Telacanthura melanopygia) is a species of swift in the family Apodidae.
It is native to the African tropical rainforest.

The '''black spinetail''' ('''''Telacanthura melanopygia''''') is a species of [[Swift (bird)|swift]] in the family [[Apodidae]].
It is native to the [[Tropical and subtropical moist broadleaf forests|African tropical rainforest]].
